text:
We fully enjoy technology and take joy in craftsmanship.
That spirit of fun overflows into our creative work,
sets users’ hearts in motion, and crosses borders around the world.
For us, enjoyment is everything.

text-[5cqw] font-black leading-none flex flex-col items-start text-key
absolute z-0 h-[96cqh] aspect-square top-0 bottom-0 right-[2cqh] m-auto
